final:
module down_counter_with_reset(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [7:0] count
    );

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 8'b11111111;
        end else begin
            count <= count - 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
